typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DataTable as string (),
	SchemeId as integer (),
	ValuationDate as timestamp (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_ServiceHostTcpUri as string ()
}

source(output(
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp,
		ClientLocationId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT [ValuationDate], [ClientLocationId], [SchemeId] FROM [Staging].[ChannelAssetDailyValuationTransform] WHERE [ImportRunId] = ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Transform
Transform sink(input(
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp 'ect.format.datetime.hypen.4year2month2day2hour24mmnute2secondsdot6nanoseconds',
		ClientLocationId as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		SchemeId,
		ValuationDate,
		ClientLocationId)) ~> OutputPlaceHolderScriptComponent
